debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
⊢ MaxDegreeLE (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM') 2

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard ≤ 1 := hM.degree_le_one v
  have h2 : (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard ≤ 1 := hM'.degree_le_one v
  have : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := he
    simp only [restrict₂, Graph.loopRemove, Graph.inc, ← iSome_iff_some, Graph.inc_iff, 
      Graph.restrict_E_iff] at hw
    obtain ⟨⟨hmm', _⟩, _⟩ := hw
    simp only [symmDiff_def, mem_diff] at hmm'
    cases hmm' with
    | inl h => exact Or.inl ⟨h.1, w, hw.2⟩
    | inr h => exact Or.inr ⟨h.1, w, hw.2⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard this
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add h1 h2
    _ = 2 := by norm_num
